---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability for the Application Plane.
title: 'feat(<scope>): <short_description>'
labels: [feature, needs-architecture]
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Overview

What is the new capability? (e.g., "Add NocoBase SLA tracking for NoviFlow switches").

## BMAD Alignment

- **PRD Link:** [Link to Planning Doc]
- **Architecture Link:** [Link to Architecture Spec]

## Testing Plan (The Testing Goat)

_Define the Red-Green-Refactor approach for this feature._

- [ ] **Acceptance Criteria:** What must be true for this to be "Done"?
- [ ] **Test Type:** (e.g., Behave BDD, Pytest Unit, or Playwright E2E)
- [ ] **Contract:** Define the expected Input/Output schema.

## Implementation Details

- **Affected Plane:** (Application/Intelligence/Management)
- **Dependencies:** List any new libraries or tool integrations.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Documentation updated in index.md.
- [ ] 100% Test Coverage for new logic.
- [ ] Code follows [Style Guide](./code_styleguides/).
